items.briefing:
Five Eyes intelligence agencies — including Australia's own cyber authorities — have issued a warning that AI is making cyber threats faster and harder to detect, lowering the barrier for criminals to launch sophisticated attacks against organisations like ours. Separately, Google has taken legal action against a Chinese network running phishing scams via fake text messages, a reminder that SMS-based scams remain a live threat here in Australia.

If you receive an unexpected text message with a link — even if it appears to be from a trusted brand — don't tap it. Go directly to the official website instead.

featured.title: Google sues Chinese phishing network over fake texts
featured.quote: Millions of Android users targeted by Chinese phishing network poses immediate threat to Australians.
